ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the election (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date when the election started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date when the election ended */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who voted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Candidate's date of birth */,
  "state" TEXT /* The state the candidate is from */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the candidate */,
  "incumbency_status" TEXT /* Whether the candidate is an incumbent (e.g., 'incumbent', 'challenger') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* The political ideology of the party */,
  "current_leader" TEXT /* The current leader of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "election_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election the result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate the result belongs to */,
  "popular_vote" INTEGER /* Number of popular votes received */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of popular votes received */,
  "electoral_votes" INTEGER /* Number of electoral votes received */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Indicates if the candidate won or lost (e.g., 'win', 'loss') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_parties" (
  "candidate_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate-party relationship */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate in the relationship */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party in the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_parties_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_parties_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_candidates" (
  "election_candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election-candidate relationship */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election in the relationship */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate in the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_candidates_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_candidates_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., query, insert) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
